title: Typed Async Work, Platform APIs, and Cancellation · Contract Lens: Abort Contracts
summary: Coordinate public-data requests, cancellation, retries, and UI state across browser and server boundaries. Planned artifact: Add and verify the ts abort contracts increment in a typed cancellable data coordinator. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Propagate AbortSignal and distinguish cancellation, timeout, transport, parsing, and domain failures.
Predict async return inference and retain discriminated result relationships across awaits.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
